title: VQE Theory: Variational Principle and Ground State Estimation
description: Deep dive into the theoretical foundations of the Variational Quantum Eigensolver, including the variational principle, Rayleigh-Ritz quotient, and mathematical guarantees.
learningObjectives: Explain the variational principle and its application to ground state estimation
Derive the Rayleigh-Ritz quotient and understand its optimization properties
Analyze the mathematical guarantees provided by variational methods
Understand the relationship between ansatz expressibility and approximation error
Implement VQE energy estimation from first principles
